name: ruflo-local
description: Local-first tiered LLM routing kit — learned-routing overlay (scripts/lib/*.mjs)
comment: Zero-runtime-config kit; the only deps are OPTIONAL ruvector packages used by recorder.mjs — @ruvector/rvf for a real .rvf routing corpus (JSONL fallback when absent) and @ruvector/ruvllm for the IN-PROCESS prompt embedder (no CLI/argv, so a private prompt never hits the process table). Tests use Node's built-in runner (node --test), no test framework.
